title: King of the Mobsters
description: This mod adds Kaiju to Minecraft from the Godzilla Franchise
body:
# Requirements
- Alex Caves
- Alex Mobs
- Ice and Fire
- Domestic Innovation
- I Wanna Skate
- The Rats Mod
- Geckolib
## Description
Tremorzilla, a lonely Mobster, a king with no rule, a power with none to test it. UNTIL NOW! Introducing an Alex' Mod Addon; King of the Mobsters. While this mod "technically" isn't a true addon, it is what I like to call a RedNeck Addon; meaning it was intended to be played with certain mods. As the updates continue, another Mobster will be added unless it's a bugfix update. Not only will you be able to have Mobsters clash against one another, but you will also be able to tame some of these Mobsters and battle against friends or join together to fight other Mobsters.
![King of the Mobsters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94425181269801f669c111f7128ed17ed420d2a0.png)
## Featuring
![Nectra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d49fe7385213cf6662ba580ac9b8c8449ccd98f6.jpeg)
![Skewdan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90e39e0342eb2b860de56cd186fe64a8f2f63c24.png)
![Anglopine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b38e1f2da7ad82f0175fe4eac9b50d9677bd11.png)
![Swagar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bd30d959a08e4da61517f0f00f6597afa79eab5.png)
![Titanoserpant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/425e5674a5cf79ecbe30db8295a04fbee1c26df2.png)
Special Thanks
* Huge Special Credit to **Magastribr** for the textures for the Mobsters including; Nectra, Skewdan, Skate Swaguar, King Chimera
* Special Credit to **ToHo** for the Godzilla Franchise as well as each Kaiju these mobsters are based on.
* Special Credit to **Alex** for Tremorzilla and the inspiration behind this mod.
* Special Credit to **MCreator** for being the foundation of this mod and helping me learn slowly how to code this mod.
